heading: Walloway vs Wami Kata — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Walloway, South Australia and Wami Kata, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wami Kata has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Walloway (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Walloway or Wami Kata safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Walloway has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Wami Kata scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Walloway scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Wami Kata scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Walloway or Wami Kata?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wami Kata has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
